goless unicode sample
=====================

ASCII:
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

Combining marks:
Café
naïve
Ångström
Zalgo-lite: H̵e̷l̴l̸o̶

Emoji and ZWJ sequences:
😀 😁 😂 🤦🏽‍♂️ 👩🏽‍💻 🧑‍🔬 🏳️‍🌈 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

Wide characters:
日本語の文章
漢字かな交じり文
界 界界 界界界

Bidirectional scripts:
שלום עולם
עברית mixed with English 123
Arabic is not a current priority, but: مرحبا بالعالم

Tabs:
name	value	status
alpha	1	ok
beta	22	wrapped
gamma	333	scroll

Visible control fallback:
beforeafter

ANSI styles:
[1mBold[0m
[4mUnderline[0m
[21mDouble underline[0m
[4:3mCurly underline[0m
[4:4mDotted underline[0m
[4:5mDashed underline[0m
[4:3;58;2;255;105;180mCurly pink underline[0m
[9mStrikethrough[0m
[7mReverse[0m
[31mRed[0m [32mGreen[0m [34mBlue[0m
[38;5;208mPalette orange[0m
[38;2;255;105;180m24-bit pink[0m
[44;38;2;255;255;255mRGB foreground on blue background[0m

OSC should be ignored:
]0;this title should not appearvisible text after OSC

OSC 8 hyperlink:
See ]8;id=sample;https://github.com/gdamore/golessgoless on GitHub]8;; for project updates.
And ]8;id=sample-http;http://example.com/demoexample over http]8;; for contrast.

Long line for wrap/scroll testing:
0123456789 abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ 😀界שלום tabs->	end
